title: Fly Machine Fall Saver
description: Wanna afk while flying on fly machine and dont lose resources in void? This mod will help!
body:
## General information
This client mod will help you to not fall off fly machine to void.
## Using
After use `/f_start` mod will save current Y coord. If player's Y coord will become less than saved one (player has fallen) - mod will disconnect from server (leave singleplayer world) or send chat command. It can be configured using `/f_config` command:
- `/f_config leave` - after fall will disconnect from server or leave world
- `/f_config command "command_without_slash"` - after fall will send chat command

**Note:** config is global between all worlds and servers\
Recommended to test mod in singleplayer creative world before using in survival to understand how exactly mod works.\
If you need help feel free to create GitHub [issue](https://github.com/RashingPro/FlyMachineFallSaver/issues)
